segments.title: Noisy coffee grinder in the kitchen
segments.summary: Peter warns colleagues about a very loud coffee grinder in the kitchen. Amy acknowledges the notice.
segments.retrieval_summary: Peter warns colleagues about loud coffee grinder in kitchen; office, kitchen, coffee.

segments.title: Lunch plans at Bree Street market
segments.summary: Justin asks if anyone is going to Bree Street market for lunch. Peter is busy but asks Justin to get him something to eat.
actions: Justin: Bring Peter lunch from the market.
segments.retrieval_summary: Justin to bring Peter lunch from bree_street market; lunch, social.

segments.title: Weather warning for heavy wind in Cape Town
segments.summary: Amy issues a heads-up about a heavy wind warning in Cape Town, mentioning the possibility of power flickers.
segments.retrieval_summary: Amy issues weather warning for heavy wind and possible power flickers in cape_town; weather, psa.

segments.title: Morning run after standup
segments.summary: Peter invites others for a run after the daily standup, but Justin declines as he is busy with work.
segments.retrieval_summary: Peter invites colleagues for a run post-standup; social, running, wellness.

segments.title: Shared article on debugging heuristics
segments.summary: Amy shares an article on debugging heuristics, suggesting it could be useful for a demo narrative. Peter agrees and asks to add it to the presentation deck notes.
actions: Peter: Drop the article link in the deck notes.
segments.retrieval_summary: Amy shares debugging heuristics article; Peter requests adding it to presentation notes for demo prep.
